channel_map._comment: Maps Cyton physical channel (1-indexed) to EEG electrode location.
channel_map._cyton_note: Cyton ch N feeds OpenBCI pin N1P through N8P on the bottom header.
channel_map._note_ch9: Channel 9 is derived. The model uses 9 channels; ch9 = EEG P4-Cz is set via the Cyton daisy or a second board. If using only 8-ch Cyton, duplicate ch8 or set use_ch9_fallback = true.
channel_map._fallback_note: When true, channel 9 is synthesised from ch8 (Pz-Cz). Set false if using a Daisy or external amplifier for P4.

signal._notch_note: Change to 60.0 for US power line frequency.

recording._window_note: Duration of each recording segment fed to the model.
recording._naming_note: Files are named record_1.edf, record_2.edf, etc. Counter resets each run unless resume = true.
recording._max_note: Set to an integer to stop after N recordings. null = run indefinitely.

model._note: Path to the CombinedEEGHandler config. Relative to repo root or absolute.

run._print_note: Print stage1/stage2 prediction after each 10-second window.
